# MultiRoundTrip.IsDeprecatedInputRequestKind method

Returns `true` when *method* is a Deprecated input-request kind (§11.2, R-11.2-i). Servers SHOULD prefer non-deprecated alternatives (e.g. `elicitation/create`).

```csharp
public static bool IsDeprecatedInputRequestKind(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The input-request method name. |

## Return Value

`true` when deprecated.
